race.comment: WAR COUNCIL (4) just missed the placings two runs back then improved last start but found one better over 1180m at Home Hill, beaten 2.75 lengths after being in the firing line on the bend. Gets the services of Wiggins in the irons and on his best form he is capable of testing his rivals. LOOMING ONE (9) finished third at this track two runs back but didn't measure up last time over 1400m here, finishing 4.5 lengths back in sixth. Suitably placed so anticipating a better run this time. KIRKALL (3) has switched yards since finishing 11th seven-and-a-half weeks ago over 1350m at Ipswich. Can make his presence felt against this line-up. TIPPED OFF (6) was allowed to drift back from an outside draw last time but found the line strongly to finish sixth, beaten 5 lengths, over 1250m at Cairns. One for the exotics players.
